ariaSpec.usage: Must be supplied when multiple toolbars exist.
The overflow button opens a menu popup.
Indicates the connection between the toggle button and the menu popup.
Icon-only button must have accessible text.
The role of the tools wrapper in the overflow section.
Associates the title of the menu toggle button.
Icon-only button must have accessible text.
Indicates the connection between the toggle button and the section popup.
The role of the tools wrapper in the overflow section.
Associates the title of the section toggle button.

kbSpec.behavior: Moves the focus to and from the ToolBar.
Moves the focus to the next focusable element in the ToolBar. Focuses the first element if the end of the ToolBar is reached.
Moves the focus to the previous focusable element in the ToolBar. Focuses the last element if the beginning of the ToolBar is reached.
Moves the focus to the first focusable element.
Moves the focus to the last focusable element.
Clicks the currently active button or changes the state of the currently active toggleable button. If the active tool is represented by an `` element, enters the inner navigation mode of the tool.
If the active tool is represented by an `` element and its inner navigation is active, deactivates the tool navigation and returns the focus to the ToolBar.
Opens the currently active SplitButton, DropDownButton, or CommandOverflow.
Closes the currently active SplitButton, DropDownButton, or CommandOverflow.
